Club Leadership

Our Board & Officers

The Rotary Club of Northlands Bustani is led by members elected to serve their fellow Rotarians and the broader community.

2025–2026 Board

Elected Officers

Charter President

Rtn Patrick Ngumo

Rtn Purity Nkirote

“Leadership in Rotary is not a title — it is a commitment to serve those who serve others.”

Rotary International

Service Above Self

A professional service organisation rooted in Northlands, Kenya. Guided by Bustani and Ubuntu. Part of Rotary International District 9212.

About Rotary

Rotary International is a global network of 1.4 million professionals in 46,000+ clubs united by a commitment to humanitarian service and fellowship.
